description: Create a comprehensive GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on every push to the main branch, on every pull request, and daily on the main branch. The workflow consists of multiple jobs: build-emscripten to build and test in WebAssembly mode with various configurations, test-asan to run unit tests under ASan, lint-js to run ESLint for JavaScript code, collect-coverage to collect code coverage statistics, and a summary job that displays the short summary of the run.
